arts.ttl: Alaves vs Real Madrid 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Alaves’ Mendizorroza needing to score the three points if they want to keep competing for the 2024-25 La Liga title. Los Blancos need to bounce back from their last two discouraging losses against Valencia and Arsenal, and while Alaves could be seen as a somewhat manageable opponent, they’re always tough to beat when they play at home.

arts.ttl: Alaves vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Alaves in what’s going to be a crucial game in the race for the 2024-25 La Liga title. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Tchouameni, Asencio, Fran Garcia, Valverde, Camavinga, Bellingham, Brahim, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes responds to Real Madrid summer transfer bid
arts.sum: That is according to Football Insider, who report that Bruno has made it clear to Madrid that he will not be quitting Man Utd at the end of the season. Bruno Fernandes has rejected a summer move to Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid XI vs Alaves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid take on relegation-threatened Alaves in La Liga on Sunday afternoon. Carlo Ancelotti’s side are reeling from a humbling Champions League defeat at Arsenal, with Los Blancos beaten 3-0 at the Emirates.
